# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Pinned obfuscation seed for the v1.0.0 fixture build.
#
# This file is consumed by R8's `-applymapping` directive.  Any class /
# method / field listed here is forced to the obfuscated name on the
# right of the `->`.  Anything NOT listed gets R8's default rotation.
#
# Lines starting with `#` are comments (standard ProGuard mapping
# convention).  The format is:
#
#   <real.fqn> -> <obfuscated>:
#       <real-return-type> <real-field-or-method-name>... -> <obf>
#
# Real return types / arg types are mandatory for methods so R8 can
# disambiguate overloads.
#
# Compare against seeds/v1.1.0.applymapping.txt — that file mimics a
# realistic minor-version rotation.  See the README for the rotation
# matrix.
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── AIDL-anchored classes (stay at real names; -keep in proguard-rules) ──
# IRemoteService, IRemoteService$Stub, IServiceCallback, IServiceCallback$Stub
# are not listed here — they aren't obfuscated at all.

# ── RemoteService — the class rename is a NO-OP ──────────────────────
# This `-> aaaa` class pin is effectively dead: RemoteService is the
# manifest `<service>` entry, so R8 keeps the real class name (and
# rewrites the manifest in lock-step) regardless of this line. The
# member pins below still apply. See README's rotation matrix.
com.example.testapp.RemoteService -> aaaa:
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> a
    int requestCounter -> b
    java.lang.String lastTag -> c
    com.example.testapp.IRemoteService$Stub binder -> d
    void safeError(com.example.testapp.IServiceCallback,int,java.lang.String) -> a

# ── Anonymous Runnable inside RemoteService.requestPrompt ─────────────
com.example.testapp.RemoteService$1 -> bbbb:
    com.example.testapp.RemoteService this$0 -> a
    android.os.Bundle val$params -> b
    com.example.testapp.IServiceCallback val$callback -> c
    void run() -> run

# ── BlobCache — pins to `cccc`, method letters `c`/`d`/`e`/`f`/`g` ──────
com.example.testapp.BlobCache -> cccc:
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> a
    int MAX_SIZE -> b
    int instanceCount -> c
    com.example.testapp.BlobCache singleton -> d
    java.util.HashMap buffer -> e
    java.lang.String lastEvictedKey -> f
    com.example.testapp.BlobCache getInstance() -> a
    java.lang.Object get(java.lang.String) -> c
    void put(java.lang.String,java.lang.Object) -> d
    void put(java.lang.String,java.lang.Object,long) -> e
    void evict(java.lang.String) -> f
    void clear() -> g

# ── Config — pins to `dddd` ───────────────────────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.Config -> dddd:
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> a
    boolean ENABLE_TRACING -> b
    int MAX_RETRIES -> c
    long TIMEOUT_MILLIS -> d
    java.lang.String ENDPOINT_URL -> e
    int currentDebugLevel -> f

# ── Ticket — pins to `eeee` ────────────────────────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.Ticket -> eeee:
    java.lang.String value -> a
    long expiryMillis -> b
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> c
    com.example.testapp.Ticket fromBytes(byte[]) -> a
    java.lang.String getValue() -> b
    long getExpiry() -> c

# ── Ticket$Companion (synthetic-style nested) ──────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.Ticket$Companion -> ffff:
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> a
    com.example.testapp.Ticket create(java.lang.String) -> a

# ── Ticket$Reader (inner instance class with synthetic accessor calls) ──
com.example.testapp.Ticket$Reader -> gggg:
    com.example.testapp.Ticket this$0 -> a
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> b
    java.lang.String readValue() -> a
    long readExpiry() -> b

# ── ErrorCode — pins to `hhhh` (enum) ─────────────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.ErrorCode -> hhhh:
    com.example.testapp.ErrorCode SUCCESS -> a
    com.example.testapp.ErrorCode TIMEOUT -> b
    com.example.testapp.ErrorCode AUTH_FAILED -> c
    int code -> d
    com.example.testapp.ErrorCode[] $VALUES -> e
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> f
    int getCode() -> a

# ── AbstractServiceClient — pins to `iiii` ────────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.AbstractServiceClient -> iiii:
    int INSTANCE_COUNT -> a
    android.content.Context context -> b
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> f
    java.lang.String anchorSink -> g
    void connect() -> a
    void disconnect() -> b
    java.lang.Runnable retryHandle() -> c

# ── AbstractServiceClient$1 (anonymous Runnable for retry) ────────────
com.example.testapp.AbstractServiceClient$1 -> jjjj:
    com.example.testapp.AbstractServiceClient this$0 -> a
    void run() -> run

# ── RemoteServiceClient — pins to `kkkk` ──────────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.RemoteServiceClient -> kkkk:
    java.lang.String sessionId -> c
    int flags -> d
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> h
    void connect() -> a
    com.example.testapp.Ticket requestTicket(android.os.Bundle) -> c
    java.lang.Object apply(java.lang.Object) -> e

# ── PromiseCallback interface — pins to `llll` ────────────────────────
com.example.testapp.PromiseCallback -> llll:
    java.lang.String ROSETTA_ANCHOR -> e
    java.lang.Object apply(java.lang.Object) -> a
